title: CSD Early Warning Classifier: Boundary Prediction with Cross-Task/Cross-Model Evaluation
summary: Demo notebook for the CSD Early Warning Classifier experiment. Builds binary classifiers predicting capability boundary proximity using 6 CSD indicator features plus delta/trend extensions. Evaluates via LOPO, LOTO, and LOMO cross-validation across 5 model-task pairs (91 rows). Compares 11 feature set variants with LogReg and RF classifiers against single-feature baselines. Includes feature importance analysis and 3-panel visualization (F1 comparison, cross-CV-scheme results, feature importances). Data: curated subset of arithmetic and graph coloring CSD indicators.
